title: L1 ticket: user cannot connect to VPN (redacted sample)
description: Typical L1 case: contains an error log snippet, a vague symptom description, and missing fields; evaluates whether the summary captures the key trio (symptom / impact / steps already tried).

input.subject: Cannot connect to VPN
input.body: Since 10 AM this morning I can't connect to the VPN; a popup says 'authentication failed'. Coworkers say they can't connect either. I tried on the machine [REDACTED:hostname:22222222] and rebooted it — no luck. I also tried my phone's hotspot, same result.

attachments.name: vpn-client.log
attachments.snippet:

2026-04-30T10:02:14Z error: peer authentication failed
2026-04-30T10:02:14Z error: ike sa establishment failed
